name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement with fillable deal-specific terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for SaaS and cloud service subscriptions.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product collaborations between vendors and design partners.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, support response times, and remedies.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting, implementation, and professional services engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for GDPR-compliant data processing arrangements between controllers and processors.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for technology partnerships, reseller relationships, and strategic alliances.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or self-hosted software licensing.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited product trials and proof-of-concept engagements.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA-compliant arrangements involving protected health information.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum for addressing artificial intelligence-specific terms in existing agreements.
